summary: Verified the unified estate selector UI fix that merged ViewSwitcher + EstateSelector into ONE dropdown button. The fix addresses mobile overflow issue where two separate buttons were displayed. All features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: EstateSelector.js: Unified component correctly shows ArrowLeftRight icon (for multi-role) + Home icon + estate name + ChevronDown in trigger - VERIFIED
EstateSelector.js: Dropdown shows 'My Estates' and 'Beneficiary Access' sections with proper styling - VERIFIED
EstateSelector.js: 'Create New Estate' option available on benefactor portal - VERIFIED
EstateSelector.js: Single-estate non-multi-role users see static pill without dropdown - VERIFIED (code inspection)
DashboardPage.js: ViewSwitcher is NOT imported (grep returned empty) - VERIFIED
DashboardPage.js: Only EstateSelector is used in header (Line 20, 465-470) - VERIFIED
BeneficiaryDashboardPage.js: ViewSwitcher is NOT imported - VERIFIED
ViewSwitcher.js: Still exists for sidebar inline variant (intentionally kept per requirements) - VERIFIED

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All unified estate selector features working correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: The estate selector has been unified into a SINGLE dropdown button that combines ViewSwitcher and EstateSelector functionality. The button shows: switch arrows (for multi-role users) + home icon + estate name + chevron. Dropdown displays 'My Estates' section with owned estates, 'Beneficiary Access' section for beneficiary estates (for multi-role users), and 'Create New Estate' option on benefactor portal. The sidebar still uses ViewSwitcher inline variant intentionally for navigation.

verified_features.single_unified_button: PASS - Only ONE estate selector button in header (no separate ViewSwitcher)
verified_features.button_elements: PASS - Shows ArrowLeftRight + Home + estate name + ChevronDown (verified 3 SVG icons)
verified_features.dropdown_my_estates_section: PASS - 'My Estates' section visible with estate entries
verified_features.viewswitcher_not_imported_dashboard: PASS - grep for ViewSwitcher in DashboardPage.js returned empty
verified_features.viewswitcher_not_imported_beneficiary: PASS - grep for ViewSwitcher in BeneficiaryDashboardPage.js returned empty
verified_features.beneficiary_dashboard_uses_estate_select: PASS - EstateSelector imported at line 9, rendered at line 149
verified_features.mobile_viewport_no_overflow: PASS - Estate selector fits within 390px mobile width
verified_features.test_user_login: PASS - fulltest@test.com / Password.123 shows dashboard with unified selector
